no-restricted-globals.name: SharedArrayBuffer
no-restricted-globals.message: SharedArrayBuffer can enable Spectre attacks — verify usage

no-restricted-properties.message: document.write is an XSS risk — use DOM methods instead
Object.assign with user input can cause prototype pollution — validate source
crypto.createCipher is deprecated — use createCipheriv with a random IV
Use crypto.randomBytes instead — pseudoRandomBytes is not cryptographically secure
Math.random is not cryptographically secure — use crypto.randomBytes for security-sensitive values
process.exit prevents graceful shutdown — throw an error or return instead
child_process.exec is vulnerable to command injection — use execFile with an args array
child_process.execSync is vulnerable to command injection — use execFileSync

no-restricted-syntax.message: Setting innerHTML is an XSS risk — use textContent or a sanitiser
Setting outerHTML is an XSS risk
insertAdjacentHTML is an XSS risk — sanitise content first
dangerouslySetInnerHTML is an XSS risk — sanitise content first
setTimeout with a string argument is equivalent to eval()
setInterval with a string argument is equivalent to eval()
Dynamic require() — potential code injection if user input reaches here
Dynamic import() — potential code injection if user input reaches here
Dynamic RegExp — potential ReDoS if user input flows into the pattern
RegExp.compile is deprecated and unsafe with dynamic input
Direct location.href assignment — check for open redirect if value is user-controlled
Setting location.href — verify no open redirect from user-controlled input
location.assign — verify no open redirect from user-controlled input
location.replace — verify no open redirect from user-controlled input
window.open — verify URL is not user-controlled (open redirect / phishing)
postMessage — verify targetOrigin is specific, not '*', to prevent data leakage
Setting href attribute — verify value is not a javascript: URL or user-controlled
Setting src attribute — verify value is not user-controlled (injection risk)
Setting form action — verify value is not user-controlled
Setting formaction — verify value is not user-controlled
Dynamic fetch URL — verify no user-controlled input (SSRF risk)
fs.readFileSync — verify path is not user-controlled (path traversal)
fs.readFile — verify path is not user-controlled (path traversal)
fs.writeFileSync — verify path is not user-controlled (arbitrary file write)
fs.writeFile — verify path is not user-controlled (arbitrary file write)
fs.createReadStream — verify path is not user-controlled
fs.createWriteStream — verify path is not user-controlled
fs.unlink — verify path is not user-controlled (arbitrary file delete)
fs.unlinkSync — verify path is not user-controlled (arbitrary file delete)
SQL query with template literal — use parameterised queries to prevent injection
SQL query with string concatenation — use parameterised queries to prevent injection
Deserialization — verify input is trusted (deserialization of untrusted data is dangerous)
unserialize — PHP-style deserialization of untrusted data is dangerous
new Function() is equivalent to eval() — avoid with user input
Sending raw headers — verify no header injection from user-controlled values
Dynamic HTTP header value — verify no CRLF injection from user input
Dynamic redirect — verify no open redirect from user-controlled input
